title: PoDiagSnapshot
description: Real-time telemetry payload served by the /diag route. All field names carry the Po prefix per FR-033. Sensitive fields (poSessionId, poUserId) are masked before rendering per FR-030.

poCapturedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this snapshot was captured.

poFps.description: Frames per second at the moment of capture, rounded to 1 decimal place.

poGeometryCount.description: Number of active Three.js BufferGeometry objects in the scene at capture time.

poHorsePositions.description: Current position of each horse in inches (0–60). Ordered by laneId ascending.

laneId.description: Lane number. Lane 1 is the player; lanes 2–8 are static placeholders in v1.0.

positionInches.description: Horse distance from start line in inches. 60 = finish crossed.

poSessionId.description: MASKED session identifier. Format: first character + '***' + last character (e.g. 'P***2'). The raw value MUST NOT appear in the rendered output.

poUserId.description: MASKED user identifier, or null if no user context exists (v1.0 default). When non-null, same masking format as poSessionId applies.

poRacePhase.description: Current race FSM phase at capture time.

poElapsedSeconds.description: Stopwatch value in seconds at capture time. 0 when not Racing.
